name: library-system-tests
description: A BDD test library to validate DWP Login and Catalogue Page

scripts.test: cross-env TEST_ENV=qa NODE_ENV=test TS_NODE_PROJECT=./tsconfig.json npx cucumber-js --require-module ts-node/register --require 'src/**/*.ts' --format progress
scripts.test:smoke: cross-env TEST_ENV=qa NODE_ENV=test TS_NODE_PROJECT=./tsconfig.json npx cucumber-js --require-module ts-node/register --require 'src/**/*.ts' --tags "@smoke" --format summary
scripts.test:headed: cross-env TEST_ENV=qa PLAYWRIGHT_HEADLESS=false NODE_ENV=test TS_NODE_PROJECT=./tsconfig.json npx cucumber-js --require-module ts-node/register --tags "@catalogue and not @ignore" --require 'src/**/*.ts' --format progress
scripts.test:parallel: cross-env TEST_ENV=qa NODE_ENV=test TS_NODE_PROJECT=./tsconfig.json npx cucumber-js --require-module ts-node/register --require 'src/**/*.ts' --format progress --parallel 4
scripts.report: mkdir -p reports && npx multiple-cucumber-html-reporter --source reports/cucumber.json --target reports/cucumber-report --name "Library System Test Report" --displayDuration
